scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('node_modules')||!fs.existsSync('apps/api/node_modules')||!fs.existsSync('apps/web/node_modules')){console.log('\n📦 Dependências faltando — executando pnpm install...\n'); require('child_process').execSync('pnpm install', {stdio:'inherit'})}"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('node_modules')||!fs.existsSync('apps/api/node_modules')||!fs.existsSync('apps/web/node_modules')){console.log('\n📦 Dependências faltando — executando pnpm install...\n'); require('child_process').execSync('pnpm install', {stdio:'inherit'})}"
scripts.dev: pnpm run infra && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @transrota/api run dev" "pnpm --filter @transrota/web run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @transrota/shared run build && pnpm --filter @transrota/api run build && pnpm --filter @transrota/web run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @transrota/api run start" "pnpm --filter @transrota/web run start"
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @transrota/api run lint && pnpm --filter @transrota/web run lint
